preconditions: I can only admit a pipeline run A if it is not the case that A is run admitted and it is not the case that A is run as promoted
effects: Once I admit a pipeline run A, it is the case that A is run admitted

allocate_retry_token_to_run.description: allocate a retry token B to a pipeline run A
preconditions: I can only allocate a retry token B to a pipeline run A if it is the case that A is run admitted and retry token B is available and B is eligible for the pipeline run A
I can only allocate a retry token B to a pipeline run A if it is not the case that A is retry claimed
effects: Once I allocate a retry token B to a pipeline run A, it is the case that A is retry allocated with B and A is retry claimed
Once I allocate a retry token B to a pipeline run A, it is not the case anymore that retry token B is available

release_retry_token_from_run.description: release a retry token B from a pipeline run A
preconditions: I can only release a retry token B from a pipeline run A if it is the case that A is retry allocated with B
I can only release a retry token B from a pipeline run A if it is not the case that the stage in A is completed and it is not the case that the approval is recorded for A
effects: Once I release a retry token B from a pipeline run A, it is the case that retry token B is available

Once I release a retry token B from a pipeline run A, it is not the case anymore that A is retry allocated with B and it is not the case anymore that A is retry claimed and it is not the case anymore that A has a confirmed reservation and it is not the case anymore that A has passed validation and it is not the case anymore that A requires manual review and it is not the case anymore that A has been approved for retry and it is not the case anymore that A has a vulnerability report

reserve_executor_for_run.description: reserve an executor reservation B for a pipeline run A
preconditions: I can only reserve an executor reservation B for a pipeline run A if it is the case that A is run admitted and reservation B is available
effects: Once I reserve an executor reservation B for a pipeline run A, it is the case that A has a reservation with B
Once I reserve an executor reservation B for a pipeline run A, it is not the case anymore that reservation B is available

release_executor_reservation.description: release an executor reservation B from a pipeline run A
preconditions: I can only release an executor reservation B from a pipeline run A if it is the case that A has a reservation with B
effects: Once I release an executor reservation B from a pipeline run A, it is the case that reservation B is available
Once I release an executor reservation B from a pipeline run A, it is not the case anymore that A has a reservation with B

confirm_reservation_activation.description: confirm reservation activation for a pipeline run A with an executor reservation B
preconditions: I can only confirm reservation activation for a pipeline run A with an executor reservation B if it is the case that A is run admitted and A is retry claimed and A has a reservation with B
I can only confirm reservation activation for a pipeline run A with an executor reservation B if it is not the case that A has a confirmed reservation
effects: Once I confirm reservation activation for a pipeline run A with an executor reservation B, it is the case that A has a confirmed reservation

human_reviewer_grant_manual_review.description: human reviewer a human reviewer B grants manual review for a pipeline run A
preconditions: I can only human reviewer a human reviewer B grants manual review for a pipeline run A if it is the case that A is run admitted and A is retry claimed and reviewer B is available
I can only human reviewer a human reviewer B grants manual review for a pipeline run A if it is not the case that A has a confirmed reservation
effects: Once I human reviewer a human reviewer B grants manual review for a pipeline run A, it is the case that A has a confirmed reservation and A requires manual review
Once I human reviewer a human reviewer B grants manual review for a pipeline run A, it is not the case anymore that reviewer B is available

apply_automation_credential_for_validati.description: apply an automation credential C for validation to a pipeline run A with an executor reservation B
preconditions: I can only apply an automation credential C for validation to a pipeline run A with an executor reservation B if it is the case that A has a confirmed reservation and A is retry claimed and A has a reservation with B and automation credential C is available
I can only apply an automation credential C for validation to a pipeline run A with an executor reservation B if it is not the case that A has passed validation
effects: Once I apply an automation credential C for validation to a pipeline run A with an executor reservation B, it is the case that A has passed validation
Once I apply an automation credential C for validation to a pipeline run A with an executor reservation B, it is not the case anymore that A requires manual review

apply_policy_based_automation_validation.description: apply policy based automation validation to a pipeline run A using a retry policy B
preconditions: I can only apply policy based automation validation to a pipeline run A using a retry policy B if it is the case that A is retry claimed and B is applied to A
I can only apply policy based automation validation to a pipeline run A using a retry policy B if it is not the case that A has passed validation
effects: Once I apply policy based automation validation to a pipeline run A using a retry policy B, it is the case that A has passed validation
Once I apply policy based automation validation to a pipeline run A using a retry policy B, it is not the case anymore that A requires manual review

assign_test_suite_to_run.description: assign a test suite B to a pipeline run A
preconditions: I can only assign a test suite B to a pipeline run A if it is the case that A is run admitted and test suite B is available and B is applicable to the pipeline run A
effects: Once I assign a test suite B to a pipeline run A, it is the case that A is assigned the test suite B
Once I assign a test suite B to a pipeline run A, it is not the case anymore that test suite B is available

unassign_test_suite_from_run.description: unassign a test suite B from a pipeline run A
preconditions: I can only unassign a test suite B from a pipeline run A if it is the case that A is assigned the test suite B
effects: Once I unassign a test suite B from a pipeline run A, it is the case that test suite B is available
Once I unassign a test suite B from a pipeline run A, it is not the case anymore that A is assigned the test suite B

assign_executor_pool_to_run.description: assign an executor pool B to a pipeline run A
preconditions: I can only assign an executor pool B to a pipeline run A if it is the case that A is run admitted and executor pool B is available and B is applicable to the pipeline run A
effects: Once I assign an executor pool B to a pipeline run A, it is the case that A is assigned the executor pool B
Once I assign an executor pool B to a pipeline run A, it is not the case anymore that executor pool B is available

unassign_executor_pool_from_run.description: unassign an executor pool B from a pipeline run A
preconditions: I can only unassign an executor pool B from a pipeline run A if it is the case that A is assigned the executor pool B
effects: Once I unassign an executor pool B from a pipeline run A, it is the case that executor pool B is available
Once I unassign an executor pool B from a pipeline run A, it is not the case anymore that A is assigned the executor pool B

assign_security_profile_to_run.description: assign a security check profile B to a pipeline run A
preconditions: I can only assign a security check profile B to a pipeline run A if it is the case that A is run admitted and security profile B is available and B is applicable to the pipeline run A
effects: Once I assign a security check profile B to a pipeline run A, it is the case that A is assigned the security profile B
Once I assign a security check profile B to a pipeline run A, it is not the case anymore that security profile B is available

unassign_security_profile_from_run.description: unassign a security check profile B from a pipeline run A
preconditions: I can only unassign a security check profile B from a pipeline run A if it is the case that A is assigned the security profile B
effects: Once I unassign a security check profile B from a pipeline run A, it is the case that security profile B is available
Once I unassign a security check profile B from a pipeline run A, it is not the case anymore that A is assigned the security profile B

bind_failure_signature_to_run.description: bind a failure signature B to a pipeline run A
preconditions: I can only bind a failure signature B to a pipeline run A if it is the case that A is run admitted and failure signature B is available and B is applicable to the pipeline run A
effects: Once I bind a failure signature B to a pipeline run A, it is the case that A is bound to the failure signature B
Once I bind a failure signature B to a pipeline run A, it is not the case anymore that failure signature B is available

unbind_failure_signature_from_run.description: unbind failure signature from run a pipeline run A a failure signature B
preconditions: I can only unbind failure signature from run a pipeline run A a failure signature B if it is the case that A is bound to the failure signature B
effects: Once I unbind failure signature from run a pipeline run A a failure signature B, it is the case that failure signature B is available
Once I unbind failure signature from run a pipeline run A a failure signature B, it is not the case anymore that A is bound to the failure signature B

validate_stage_with_required_checks.description: validate a pipeline stage B with required checks for a pipeline run A using a test suite C and an executor pool D
preconditions: I can only validate a pipeline stage B with required checks for a pipeline run A using a test suite C and an executor pool D if it is the case that A is retry claimed and A is assigned the test suite C and A is assigned the executor pool D and pipeline stage B is available and B is applicable to the pipeline run A
I can only validate a pipeline stage B with required checks for a pipeline run A using a test suite C and an executor pool D if it is not the case that the stage in A is completed
effects: Once I validate a pipeline stage B with required checks for a pipeline run A using a test suite C and an executor pool D, it is the case that B in A is validated and the stage in A is completed
Once I validate a pipeline stage B with required checks for a pipeline run A using a test suite C and an executor pool D, it is not the case anymore that pipeline stage B is available

validate_stage_with_security_and_vuln.description: validate a pipeline stage B with security and vulnerability checks for a pipeline run A using a security check profile C and a vulnerability report D
preconditions: I can only validate a pipeline stage B with security and vulnerability checks for a pipeline run A using a security check profile C and a vulnerability report D if it is the case that A is retry claimed and A is assigned the security profile C and vulnerability report D is available and pipeline stage B is available and B is applicable to the pipeline run A and D is applicable to the pipeline run A

I can only validate a pipeline stage B with security and vulnerability checks for a pipeline run A using a security check profile C and a vulnerability report D if it is not the case that the stage in A is completed
effects: Once I validate a pipeline stage B with security and vulnerability checks for a pipeline run A using a security check profile C and a vulnerability report D, it is the case that B in A is validated and the stage in A is completed and A has a vulnerability report and A requires manual review

Once I validate a pipeline stage B with security and vulnerability checks for a pipeline run A using a security check profile C and a vulnerability report D, it is not the case anymore that pipeline stage B is available and it is not the case anymore that vulnerability report D is available

clear_vulnerability_flag_after_remediati.description: clear vulnerability flag after remediation for a pipeline run A using a test suite B and an executor pool C
preconditions: I can only clear vulnerability flag after remediation for a pipeline run A using a test suite B and an executor pool C if it is the case that the stage in A is completed and A has a vulnerability report and A is assigned the test suite B and A is assigned the executor pool C
effects: Once I clear vulnerability flag after remediation for a pipeline run A using a test suite B and an executor pool C, it is not the case anymore that A has a vulnerability report and it is not the case anymore that A requires manual review

record_approval_by_oncall_team.description: record approval by an oncall team D for a pipeline run A using a test suite B and an executor pool C
preconditions: I can only record approval by an oncall team D for a pipeline run A using a test suite B and an executor pool C if it is the case that A has passed validation and the stage in A is completed and A is assigned the test suite B and A is assigned the executor pool C and D is the accountable team for the pipeline run A

I can only record approval by an oncall team D for a pipeline run A using a test suite B and an executor pool C if it is not the case that A requires manual review and it is not the case that the approval is recorded for A
effects: Once I record approval by an oncall team D for a pipeline run A using a test suite B and an executor pool C, it is the case that the approval is recorded for A

record_approval_and_bind_policy_by_revie.description: record approval and bind policy by a review team D for a pipeline run A with a security check profile B and a failure signature C
preconditions: I can only record approval and bind policy by a review team D for a pipeline run A with a security check profile B and a failure signature C if it is the case that A has passed validation and the stage in A is completed and A is assigned the security profile B and A is bound to the failure signature C and D is the accountable team for the pipeline run A
I can only record approval and bind policy by a review team D for a pipeline run A with a security check profile B and a failure signature C if it is not the case that the approval is recorded for A
effects: Once I record approval and bind policy by a review team D for a pipeline run A with a security check profile B and a failure signature C, it is the case that the approval is recorded for A and A requires manual review

promote_run_after_approval.description: promote a pipeline run A after approval with a test suite B and an executor pool C
preconditions: I can only promote a pipeline run A after approval with a test suite B and an executor pool C if it is the case that the approval is recorded for A and A requires manual review and A is assigned the test suite B and A is assigned the executor pool C
effects: Once I promote a pipeline run A after approval with a test suite B and an executor pool C, it is the case that A has been approved for retry

Once I promote a pipeline run A after approval with a test suite B and an executor pool C, it is not the case anymore that A requires manual review and it is not the case anymore that A has passed validation and it is not the case anymore that A has a vulnerability report

activate_reservation_and_trigger_validat.description: activate reservation for a pipeline run A and trigger validation with an executor reservation B and an automation credential C
preconditions: I can only activate reservation for a pipeline run A and trigger validation with an executor reservation B and an automation credential C if it is the case that A has been approved for retry and the approval is recorded for A and A is retry claimed and A has a reservation with B and automation credential C is available
I can only activate reservation for a pipeline run A and trigger validation with an executor reservation B and an automation credential C if it is not the case that A has passed validation
effects: Once I activate reservation for a pipeline run A and trigger validation with an executor reservation B and an automation credential C, it is the case that A has passed validation

lock_executor_slot_for_retry.description: lock executor slot for retry for a pipeline run A with an executor reservation B
preconditions: I can only lock executor slot for retry for a pipeline run A with an executor reservation B if it is the case that the approval is recorded for A and A has passed validation and A has a reservation with B

I can only lock executor slot for retry for a pipeline run A with an executor reservation B if it is not the case that A requires manual review and it is not the case that the executor slot is locked for A
effects: Once I lock executor slot for retry for a pipeline run A with an executor reservation B, it is the case that the executor slot is locked for A

request_human_review_lock_slot.description: request human review to lock slot for a pipeline run A with a human reviewer B
preconditions: I can only request human review to lock slot for a pipeline run A with a human reviewer B if it is the case that the approval is recorded for A and A has passed validation and reviewer B is available

I can only request human review to lock slot for a pipeline run A with a human reviewer B if it is not the case that A requires manual review and it is not the case that the executor slot is locked for A
effects: Once I request human review to lock slot for a pipeline run A with a human reviewer B, it is the case that the executor slot is locked for A
Once I request human review to lock slot for a pipeline run A with a human reviewer B, it is not the case anymore that reviewer B is available

bind_service_policy_candidate.description: bind a retry policy B as service policy candidate for a pipeline run A
preconditions: I can only bind a retry policy B as service policy candidate for a pipeline run A if it is the case that the executor slot is locked for A and retry policy B is available and A has a service policy binding with B
effects: Once I bind a retry policy B as service policy candidate for a pipeline run A, it is the case that B is the service policy candidate for the pipeline run A
Once I bind a retry policy B as service policy candidate for a pipeline run A, it is not the case anymore that retry policy B is available

apply_component_and_service_policy_bindi.description: apply a retry policy C to a component run A and bind with a service run B
preconditions: I can only apply a retry policy C to a component run A and bind with a service run B if it is the case that A is run admitted and A is a component run and A is a candidate for the component policy C and C is the service policy candidate for the pipeline run B
I can only apply a retry policy C to a component run A and bind with a service run B if it is not the case that C is applied to A
effects: Once I apply a retry policy C to a component run A and bind with a service run B, it is the case that C is applied to A

mark_post_checks_ready_for_run.description: mark post checks ready for a pipeline run A using an executor reservation B and an automation credential C
preconditions: I can only mark post checks ready for a pipeline run A using an executor reservation B and an automation credential C if it is the case that A is run admitted and A is a component run and A has passed validation and the executor slot is locked for A and A has a reservation with B and automation credential C is available
I can only mark post checks ready for a pipeline run A using an executor reservation B and an automation credential C if it is not the case that post checks are ready for A
effects: Once I mark post checks ready for a pipeline run A using an executor reservation B and an automation credential C, it is the case that post checks are ready for A

finalize_promotion_for_service_run.description: finalize promotion for a service run A
preconditions: I can only finalize promotion for a service run A if it is the case that A is a service run and A is run admitted and A is retry claimed and the stage in A is completed and the approval is recorded for A and the executor slot is locked for A and A has passed validation
I can only finalize promotion for a service run A if it is not the case that A is run as promoted
effects: Once I finalize promotion for a service run A, it is the case that A is run as promoted

finalize_promotion_with_policy_for_compo.description: finalize promotion with a retry policy B for a component run A
preconditions: I can only finalize promotion with a retry policy B for a component run A if it is the case that A is a component run and A is run admitted and A is retry claimed and the stage in A is completed and the approval is recorded for A and the executor slot is locked for A and A has passed validation and B is applied to A
I can only finalize promotion with a retry policy B for a component run A if it is not the case that A is run as promoted
effects: Once I finalize promotion with a retry policy B for a component run A, it is the case that A is run as promoted

finalize_promotion_with_component_checks.description: finalize promotion with component checks for a component run A
preconditions: I can only finalize promotion with component checks for a component run A if it is the case that A is a component run and A is run admitted and A is retry claimed and the stage in A is completed and the approval is recorded for A and the executor slot is locked for A and A has passed validation and post checks are ready for A
I can only finalize promotion with component checks for a component run A if it is not the case that A is run as promoted
effects: Once I finalize promotion with component checks for a component run A, it is the case that A is run as promoted

action_nl_templates.allocate_retry_token_to_run: allocate retry token {?retry_token} to pipeline run {?pipeline_run}
action_nl_templates.release_retry_token_from_run: release retry token {?retry_token} from pipeline run {?pipeline_run}
action_nl_templates.reserve_executor_for_run: reserve executor reservation {?executor_reservation} for pipeline run {?pipeline_run}
action_nl_templates.release_executor_reservation: release executor reservation {?executor_reservation} from pipeline run {?pipeline_run}
action_nl_templates.confirm_reservation_activation: confirm reservation activation for pipeline run {?pipeline_run} with executor reservation {?executor_reservation}
action_nl_templates.human_reviewer_grant_manual_review: human reviewer human reviewer {?human_reviewer} grants manual review for pipeline run {?pipeline_run}
action_nl_templates.apply_automation_credential_for_validati: apply automation credential {?automation_credential} for validation to pipeline run {?pipeline_run} with executor reservation {?executor_reservation}
action_nl_templates.apply_policy_based_automation_validation: apply policy-based automation validation to pipeline run {?pipeline_run} using retry policy {?retry_policy}
action_nl_templates.assign_test_suite_to_run: assign test suite {?test_suite} to pipeline run {?pipeline_run}
action_nl_templates.unassign_test_suite_from_run: unassign test suite {?test_suite} from pipeline run {?pipeline_run}
action_nl_templates.assign_executor_pool_to_run: assign executor pool {?executor_pool} to pipeline run {?pipeline_run}
action_nl_templates.unassign_executor_pool_from_run: unassign executor pool {?executor_pool} from pipeline run {?pipeline_run}
action_nl_templates.assign_security_profile_to_run: assign security check profile {?security_check_profile} to pipeline run {?pipeline_run}
action_nl_templates.unassign_security_profile_from_run: unassign security check profile {?security_check_profile} from pipeline run {?pipeline_run}

type_hierarchy: Everything that is a pipeline run or a retry token or a pipeline stage or a executor pool or a test suite or a security check profile or a executor reservation or a human reviewer or a retry policy or a automation credential or a vulnerability report or a failure signature or a responsible team is also a object
Everything that is a oncall team or a review team is also a responsible team
Everything that is a service run or a component run is also a pipeline run
